EXPLANATION: This is a well-known textbook in the field of computer science, and the cited title and authors are correct for the widely used book "Mining of Massive Datasets." The book is published by Cambridge University Press and is available online in an authorized version maintained by the authors.

LINK: http://www.mmds.org/
FOUND_TITLE: Mining of Massive Datasets
FOUND_AUTHORS: Jure Leskovec, Anand Rajaraman, Jeffrey David Ullman
FOUND_YEAR: 2020
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
